headline: Salesforce Jumps 5%, Adobe Climbs 6%, Snowflake Rockets 9% in a Broad Software Sector Rebound
summary: The software sector is staging a meaningful comeback on Monday, with three closely watched names leading the charge. Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) shares are jumping 5% to $173, Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) shares are climbing 6%, to $238, and Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) shares are surging 9%, rallying to $132. The moves are striking given the brutal backdrop all three have ... Salesforce Jumps 5%, Adobe Climbs 6%, Snowflake Rockets 9% in a Broad Software Sector Rebound
